name: Unrestricted Externally Accessible Lock
description: The product properly checks for the existence of a lock before operating on a resource, but the lock can be externally controlled or influenced by an actor outside the intended trust boundary, allowing an attacker to hold the lock indefinitely and cause denial of service.
detection_pattern: CONTROL node implementing a lock check on a STORAGE resource where the lock state is influenced by an INGRESS or EXTERNAL node from an untrusted source, without an AUTH or CONTROL node restricting who can acquire or hold the lock
